claims.statement: Kola Superdeep Borehole depth is smaller than CN Tower height.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Kola Superdeep Borehole depth: 12262 m. CN Tower height: 553.3 m.

claims.statement: Category 5 hurricane threshold is faster than Cheetah sprint.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Category 5 hurricane threshold: 252 km/h. Cheetah sprint: 120 km/h.

claims.statement: Panama Canal length is at least 6× longer than Seikan Tunnel length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Panama Canal length: 82 km. Seikan Tunnel length: 53.85 km.

claims.statement: There are more known chemical elements than grams in a kilogram.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 118 elements vs 1,000 g.

claims.statement: Penicillin discovered happened before Wikipedia launched.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. Penicillin discovered: 1928. Wikipedia launched: 2001.
